metrics.name: revenue_proxy
metrics.label: Revenue Proxy
metrics.description: Total observed monetary value in the scored customer base.

metrics.name: avg_ltv
metrics.label: Average LTV
metrics.description: Average expected lifetime value across customers in scope.

metrics.name: avg_cac
metrics.label: Average CAC
metrics.description: Average customer acquisition cost blended across channels.

metrics.name: avg_ltv_cac_ratio
metrics.label: Average LTV/CAC
metrics.description: Average efficiency ratio across the active portfolio.

metrics.name: high_churn_risk_pct
metrics.label: High Churn Risk Share
metrics.description: Share of customers with churn probability at or above 70%.
